full_name: Qatar National Information Security Compliance Framework (NISCF) — NIA

controls.description: An information security governance framework must be established, documented, and approved by senior leadership.
controls.logic: FAIL if no governance_framework document exists with management_approval, or if framework_last_reviewed is older than 12 months.

controls.requirement: Information Security Policy Approved and Communicated
controls.description: A formal information security policy must be approved by management and communicated to all staff.
controls.logic: FAIL if policy_approval_date = NULL, or if staff_acknowledgement_rate < 90%, or if policy_last_updated older than 12 months.

controls.description: A formal information security risk assessment must be conducted at least once a year.
controls.logic: FAIL if risk_assessment_date is older than 12 months, or if risk_assessment_scope excludes critical government systems.

controls.description: Access to government information systems must be restricted based on need-to-know and least privilege principles.
controls.logic: FAIL if any user has access to classified systems without formal access_authorization, or if access_review_date older than 90 days.

controls.description: All privileged accounts must be individually authorized, monitored, and reviewed quarterly.
controls.logic: FAIL if any privileged account has no formal_authorization, or if privileged_session_monitoring = FALSE, or if review_date older than 90 days.

controls.description: All significant information security incidents must be reported to Qatar NIA within defined timeframes.
controls.logic: FAIL if any major_incident has nia_notification_sent = FALSE, or if notification_delay_hours > 4 for CRITICAL incidents.

controls.description: A Business Continuity Plan must be in place and tested annually.
controls.logic: FAIL if bcp_tested = FALSE in the last 12 months, or if bcp_test_result = 'FAILED'.

controls.requirement: Compliance with Qatar Laws and Regulations
controls.description: The organization must maintain compliance with all applicable Qatari laws including Cybercrime Law No. 14 of 2014.
controls.logic: FAIL if any compliance_item with applicable_law LIKE '%Qatar%' has compliance_status = 'NON_COMPLIANT'.
